creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 252453
Patch restoring support for GSSAPI (9.8p1)

This patch unbreaks GSSAPI by pointing the port to the recently released GSSAPI patches.

I'm running a test build at the moment. I'll try to get some testing of the patch also. I am posting it now to let other folks run their tests as well.
